title: Biotech Competitor Deep Dive
summary:
Revenue: $499/report, retainer option ($1,500/mo for monthly reports).
- **Time to first $**: 2 days (Upwork + LinkedIn outreach).
- **First action**: Create Upwork profile titled "Biotech Competitor Analyst - 48hr Delivery" with sample report snippet.
- **Risk**: Biotech founders skeptical of speed (mitigated by sample report).
Next step: Create Upwork profile titled "Biotech Competitor Analyst - 48hr Delivery" with sample report snippet.
